LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI'S MOTION TO VACATE THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND REQUEST TO PERMIT FILING OF REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI'S MOTION TO VACATE THE ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT AND REQUEST TO PERMIT FILING OF REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO IS DENIED UNDER CCP SECTION 473(B), WHICH REQUIRES THE MOTION TO BE MADE WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME, AND NO SATISFACTORY REASONS HAVING BEEN SHOWN FOR THE DELAY IN THIS CASE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Denial Of Motion To Vacate Clerk'S Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: jeffrey tsu, esq. 650.342.3523 x252, for plaintiff peter chiu.
michael smith, esq., stratman, patterson & hunter, 510.457.3463, for defendant majed fakhouri.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI'S Motion To Reconsider Denial Of Motion To Vacate Clerk'S Entry Of Judgment is denied. At the July 31, 2012 hearing on the motion to vacate, Defendant failed to present a satisfactory reason for its delay in filing the motion to vacate. At that hearing, Defendant failed to raise the issues regarding defense counsel's divorce and residential move. Defendant now fails to provide a valid reason for not offering those facts earlier. As Plaintiff's counsel aptly phrases the situation in his Reply, "tardy facts are not new facts." Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Denial Of Motion To Vacate Clerk'S Entry Of Judgment

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI's Motion To Reconsider Denial Of Motion To Vacate Clerk'S Entry Of Judgment is Continued on the Court's own motion September 18, 2012 at 9:30am in Department 302 to be heard by Judge Karnow. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Entry Of Judgement And Request To Permit Filing Of Request For Trial De Novo
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY C. TSU, TEL. NO. (650) 342-3523 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL J. SMITH OF STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3463 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI'S Motion To Vacate The Entry Of Judgment And Request To Permit Filing Of Request For Trial De Novo IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI'S Motion To Vacate The Entry Of Judgement And Request To Permit Filing Of Request For Trial De Novo IS DENIED UNDER CCP SECTION 473(B), WHICH REQUIRES THE MOTION TO BE MADE WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME, AND NO SATISFACTORY REASONS HAVING BEEN SHOWN FOR THE DELAY IN THIS CASE. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =302/CK

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Entry Of Judgement And Request To Permit Filing Of Request For Trial De Novo
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael J. Smith, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 510.457.3463, appearing for Defendant and moving party;
Jeffrey Tsu, Esq. of the L/O of Jeffrey Tsu, Tel. 415.342.3523, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

Plaintiff's counsel submitted a copy of the opposition to the court. The court vacated its tentative ruling and DEFENDANT MAJED FAKHOURI's Motion To Vacate The Entry Of Judgment And Request To Permit Filing Of Request For Trial De Novo is continued to July 31, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489
